title: Trimble Shares Have Gotten Too Cheap To Ignore
text: Trimble's valuation has become quite compelling, and while it might not look like a value stock it is important to remember that this is considered a growth stock. Despite the moderating growth, we continue to see shares as undervalued, and believe current prices offer attractive entry point.

title: SketchUp for iPad Ushers in a New Way to Create in 3D, Anywhere
text: Intuitive, Powerful 3D Modeler Built for On-the-Go Workflows SUNNYVALE, Calif. , April 19, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) announced today the launch of SketchUp for iPad, a new app that combines the power of 3D with the ease of sketching by hand.

title: Trimble to Divest Four Businesses to The Jordan Company
text: SUNNYVALE, Calif. , April 13, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) announced today that it has entered into a definitive agreement to sell its Time and Frequency, LOADRITE, Spectra Precision Tools and SECO accessories businesses to Precisional LLC, an affiliate of The Jordan Company ("TJC").

title: Trimble Opens Registration for its 2022 Insight Tech Conference + Expo
text: Annual Event Brings Together the Transportation Supply Chain SUNNYVALE, Calif. , April 8, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB) opened registration for its 2022 Insight Tech Conference + Expo, which will be held Aug. 14-17 at the Walt Disney World Swan and Dolphin Resort in Orlando, Florida.
